creator: gaspeak@va.prestige.net
text:
make package fails on ports/audio/xmms

after install pkg_create fails with:
tar: can't add file share/gnome/xmms/wmxmms.xpm: No such file or directory
pkg_create: make_dist: tar command failed with code 256

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/audio/xmms
make package
